sections.heading: Recommendations
sections.content:
- **pev-architect** (PEV Architect: plan test runner deprecation): handoff gap is 100% — include more context in dispatch prompt
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: deprecate test runner): 6 redundant read(s) — pre-fetch cortex_source output into dispatch
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: deprecate test runner): dispatch missing context bundle — orchestrator should inline pitch + cortex_source output
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: deprecate test runner): only 30% of exploration uses cortex tools — prefer cortex_source/cortex_graph over Read/Grep to reduce context
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: finish frontend cleanup): dispatch missing context bundle — orchestrator should inline pitch + cortex_source output
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: finish frontend cleanup): only 3% of exploration uses cortex tools — prefer cortex_source/cortex_graph over Read/Grep to reduce context
- **pev-auditor** (PEV Auditor: review stale nodes and update docs): handoff gap is 74% — include more context in dispatch prompt
